title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.712 - Dental primary care and preventative health services
text:
105.712.  Dental primary care and preventative health services. — Dental primary care and preventive health services as authorized in section 105.711 shall include examinations, cleaning, fluoride treatment, application of sealants, placement of basic restorations, extractions, and emergency treatment to relieve pain.
(L. 2001 S.B. 393 § 1, A.L. 2005 S.B. 177)
